ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number for customer reference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount calculated for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order containing the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order item */,
  "product_variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a specific product variant (e.g., size, color) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal for the order item (quantity * unit_price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit for inventory management */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Key features of the product (e.g., material, brand) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., manufacturer, distributor) */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a loyalty program the customer is part of */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer through the loyalty program */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of the address (e.g., shipping, billing) */,
  "address_name" TEXT /* Nickname for the address (e.g., 'Home', 'Work') */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geolocation latitude */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geolocation longitude */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "payment_provider" TEXT /* Payment provider (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "payment_provider_id" TEXT /* ID used by the payment provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_log" (
  "status_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was changed */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., 'shipped', 'cancelled by customer') */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_log_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last active */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Language preference of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the transaction is associated with */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was processed */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, refund) */,
  "transaction_fee" TEXT /* Fee charged by the payment provider */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference or ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)
